Django News Capstone

Contents Home News App Users App
Indices General Index Module Index

Users App

Models

users.models

Custom user model for the Django News Capstone. Extends AbstractUser to add a bio field.

class users.models.CustomUser

Extended user model with a bio field. Used as the AUTH_USER_MODEL for this project.

Additional Fields:

  • bio — TextField(blank=True, null=True) — A short biography of the user.
__str__()

Returns the username.

Views

users.views

Provides user registration and user detail endpoints.

class users.views.UserListView

Returns a list of all registered users.

  • GET /api/users/ — List all users
class users.views.UserRegisterView

Registers a new user account.

  • POST /api/users/register/ — Register a new user
create(request, *args, **kwargs)

Validates the registration data, creates the user, and returns a success message alongside the new user's data.

class users.views.UserDetailView

Handles retrieve, update, and delete operations for a single user.

  • GET /api/users/<id>/ — Retrieve a user
  • PUT /api/users/<id>/ — Update a user
  • DELETE /api/users/<id>/ — Delete a user

Serializers

users.serializers

class users.serializers.UserSerializer

Serializer for reading user data. Excludes the password field. Fields: id, username, email, bio, date_joined.

class users.serializers.UserRegisterSerializer

Serializer for registering a new user. Accepts a write-only password field with a minimum length of 8 characters.

create(validated_data)

Creates a new CustomUser using create_user to ensure the password is properly hashed.
